uk: Свв. мучеників Трофима, Савватія й Доримедонта
saints.en: Saturday after the Exaltation. Sts. Martyrs Trophimus, Sabbatius & Dorymedon

rubrics:
Вечірня: катизма чергова. На «Господи взиваю» – 6 стихир: 3 свята, 3 мчч., Слава: мчч., І нині: свята. На стиховні: стихири свята. Тропар мчч., Слава, І нині: свята. Відпуст великий з помин. служби свята і мчч.
Утреня: по «Бог Господь»: тропар свята (2), Слава: мчч., І нині: свята. Катизми чергові і сідальний свята. Псалом 50. Канон свята і мчч. По 9-ій – світильний мчч. Слава, І нині: світильний свята. Стиховня – вся свята. Тропар мчч., Слава, І нині: свята.
Часи: тропар свята, також на 3-му і 9-му ще Слава: мчч., кондаки – поперемінно, тобто: на 1-му і 6-му – свята, на 3-му і 9-му – мчч.
Літургія: антифони перших два – з самого свята, третій – загальний з приспівом свята, також і «Прийдіте, поклонімся» з приспівом свята. Тропар свята, Слава, І нині: кондак свята. Прокімен, алилуя і причасний – свята, апостол і євангеліє – Суботи: Ап. – 1 Кор. 125 зач.; 1, 26-29. Єв. – Ів. 30 зач.; 8, 21-30. Замість «Достойно» – ірмос 9-ої пісні канону свята з його приспівом.

troparion_en.text: God praised in Trinity has glorified a trinity of martyrs: / Trophimus, Sabbatius, and Dorymedon. / By their faith, they overthrew the adversary. / Through their prayers, O Christ our God, have mercy on us.

kontakion_en.text: As the foundation of athletes and the confirmation of piety / the Church honors and glorifies your brilliant suffering, / wise and glorious Trophimus, ever-praised and blessed athlete. / Together with your fellow sufferers, ask cleansing for those who hymn you, / for you are invincible.

matched_oca_saint: Martyrs Trophimus, Sabbatius, and Dorymedon of Synnada

oca_saints.name: Afterfeast of the Elevation of the Cross

troparion.text: O Lord, save Your people, / and bless Your inheritance. / Grant victories to the Orthodox Christians / over their adversaries. / And by virtue of Your Cross, / preserve Your habitation.

kontakion.text: As You were voluntarily raised upon the cross for our sake, / grant mercy to those who are called by Your Name, O Christ God; / make all Orthodox Christians glad by Your power, / granting them victories over their adversaries, / by bestowing on them the Invincible trophy, Your weapon of Peace.

oca_saints.name: Martyrs Trophimus, Sabbatius, and Dorymedon of Synnada

troparion.text: God praised in Trinity has glorified a trinity of martyrs: / Trophimus, Sabbatius, and Dorymedon. / By their faith, they overthrew the adversary. / Through their prayers, O Christ our God, have mercy on us.

kontakion.text: As the foundation of athletes and the confirmation of piety / the Church honors and glorifies your brilliant suffering, / wise and glorious Trophimus, ever-praised and blessed athlete. / Together with your fellow sufferers, ask cleansing for those who hymn you, / for you are invincible.

oca_saints.name: Saint Theodore, Prince of Smolensk and Yaroslav, and his sons Saints David and Constantine

troparion.text: From your youth you clung to Christ’s love / and you eagerly kept his laws. / You were enriched with miraculous gifts / and now pour forth healings, Theodore, David and Constantine / pray to Christ our God to save those who honor you!

kontakion.text: While in the flesh you were radiant lamps living like the angels. / By fasting, vigils and faith you grew like the trees in paradise. / You blossomed in prayer through the grace you received. / You have become mighty physicians, healing infirmity of souls. / O glorious wonderworkers Theodore, David, and Constantine, / pray to Christ our God for the forgiveness of those who venerate your memory!

oca_saints.name: Martyr Zosimas the Hermit of Cilicia

troparion.text: The image of God was truly preserved in you, O Father, / for you took up the Cross and followed Christ. / By so doing you taught us to disregard the flesh for it passes away / but to care instead for the soul, since it is immortal. / Therefore your spirit, venerable Zosimas, rejoices with the angels.

kontakion.text: As a venerable and proven ascetic, as an honorable and renowned martyr,  / and as a model of the desert life, O most exalted Zosimas, /  we sing hymns of praise to you,  / for you have trampled upon serpents.

oca_saints.name: Saint Theodore of Tarsus, Archbishop of Canterbury

troparion.text: In truth you were revealed to your flock as a rule of faith, / an image of humility and a teacher of abstinence; / your humility exalted you; / your poverty enriched you. / Hierarch Father Theodore, / entreat Christ our God / that our souls may be saved.
